title: Interactive Storybook Book Schema
description: Schema for a complete, multi-scene interactive storybook, designed for AI-driven mass production.

metadata.description: Global metadata for the entire book.

title.description: Book title. (e.g., 'The Little Prince and the Fox')

author.description: Author of the book. (e.g., 'Antoine de Saint-Exupéry')

description.description: Brief description or synopsis of the book.

language_pairs.description: Supported language pairs for bilingual mode. (e.g., [['en', 'zh'], ['en', 'fr']])

cover_image.description: Path to the book's cover image.

global_ui_config.description: Global UI/UX configurations for the entire book.

font_family.description: Primary font family for the book (e.g., 'Nunito', 'Playfair Display').

theme_color.description: Primary theme color (hex code or CSS variable name).

scenes.description: Array of individual scenes that make up the book.

scene_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific scene. (e.g., 'scene_desert_fox_intro')

type.description: Type of scene, defining its core functionality.

order.description: The sequential order of the scene in the book. (e.g., 1, 2, 3)

content.description: The actual content and interactive elements for the scene. This will heavily reuse and extend the previous `scene_schema.json` concepts.

next_scene_id.description: Optional: Explicit ID of the next scene. If not present, default sequential order is used.

prev_scene_id.description: Optional: Explicit ID of the previous scene. If not present, default sequential order is used.

conditional_next_scene.description: Defines conditional branching to other scenes based on user interaction outcomes.
